description: React Native Developer with 3+ years of experience in production mobile apps. Specialized in multi-app architectures, TypeScript and REST APIs.
aboutText1: I'm a React Native Developer with 3+ years of experience building production mobile applications. Specialized in multi-app architectures with shared code, independent app generation and deployment, and developing new features in real-world environments.
aboutText2: Used to working with TypeScript, REST APIs, and agile methodologies, focused on stability, scalability, and user experience. Currently expanding my expertise in web development with Next.js, Firebase, and Cloudinary.

experience1.title: Frontend Developer
experience1.description: Full development of an E-commerce solution with Next.js and React architecture, private CMS, Firebase, image workflows with Cloudinary, modular design and scalable deployments.

experience2.title: React Native Developer
experience2.description: Development and maintenance of a React Native monorepo for 5 retail apps, with a single shared codebase adaptable to each store. Management of whitelabel flows, resolution of critical incidents, continuous performance improvement, and work with TypeScript, REST APIs and Git in agile teams.

experience3.title: React Native Developer (Social Project)
experience3.description: Social impact on community apps, user experience improvement and creation of comprehensive technical documentation.
